rulings.Rulings: Continued to January 23, 2018. Multiple filings occurred on 12/27/17 and 12/28/17, and the examiner has not received file stamped hard copies of any of the filings (the only copy received of one filing was not file stamped). new deadline for providing the examiner a hard copy of the filings is Wednesday, January 17, 2018. NOTE-->faxed or emailed copies are NOT accepted. Please note further, the Petition to Transfer Funds will be continued from 1/22/18 to 1/23/18 for efficiency, even though it involves a different issue.
